3076110.name: Fruits & Vegetables
3076110.description:
Fruits & Vegetables is a clicker game. You can merge fruits and vegetables to get new ones!

To make your experience in the game more interesting and diverse, the game features a variety of visualization styles!

Our game features an exciting Puzzle Mode where players can match identical fruits to create new varieties. By doing so, you'll earn more in-game points and advance to new challenges. Enjoy the fun of discovering unique fruit combinations and progressing through the levels!

Discover the excitement of item drops in our game! Every few hours, various valuable fruits will appear in your inventory, enhancing your gameplay experience. Don't miss out on collecting these unique rewards and enjoy the thrill of discovering new items regularly!
3076110.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
